field.name: tsc_with_igtf
field.invisible: not tsc_currency_id_apply_IGTF or not ((payment_type == 'inbound' and partner_type == 'customer') or (payment_type == 'outbound' and partner_type == 'supplier'))

field.name: tsc_igtf_payment_journal
field.invisible: not tsc_currency_id_apply_IGTF or not ((payment_type == 'inbound' and partner_type == 'customer') or (payment_type == 'outbound' and partner_type == 'supplier'))

label.invisible: not tsc_currency_id_apply_IGTF or not ((payment_type == 'inbound' and partner_type == 'customer') or (payment_type == 'outbound' and partner_type == 'supplier'))

div.name: tsc_igtf_payment_amount_div
div.invisible: not tsc_currency_id_apply_IGTF or not ((payment_type == 'inbound' and partner_type == 'customer') or (payment_type == 'outbound' and partner_type == 'supplier'))

label.invisible: not tsc_currency_id_apply_IGTF or not ((payment_type == 'inbound' and partner_type == 'customer') or (payment_type == 'outbound' and partner_type == 'supplier'))

div.name: tsc_amount_with_igtf_div
div.invisible: not tsc_currency_id_apply_IGTF or not ((payment_type == 'inbound' and partner_type == 'customer') or (payment_type == 'outbound' and partner_type == 'supplier'))

button.name: tsc_activate_igtf
button.invisible: tsc_with_igtf or not tsc_currency_id_apply_IGTF or not ((payment_type == 'inbound' and partner_type == 'customer') or (payment_type == 'outbound' and partner_type == 'supplier'))

button.name: tsc_deactivate_igtf
button.invisible: not tsc_with_igtf or not tsc_currency_id_apply_IGTF or not ((payment_type == 'inbound' and partner_type == 'customer') or (payment_type == 'outbound' and partner_type == 'supplier'))
